name: Send news from various categories to email

parameters.text:
=Act as an expert news editor. Analyze the following list of international news and select only the 10 most important ones based on global impact, political relevance, or significant human interest.
Formatting instructions:
1. Select exactly 10 news items.
2. Do not enumerate each item.
3. For each item, list the title followed by its link on the immediate line below.
4. Separate each news block with a single blank line.
5. Provide only the list. Do not include introductions, conclusions, or additional commentary.
Here is the list of news:
{{ $json.lista_noticias.map(item => item.title + "-" + item.link).join('\n') }}

=Act as an expert news editor. Analyze the following list of international news and select only the 10 most important ones based on global impact, political relevance, or significant human interest.
Formatting instructions:
1. Select exactly 10 news items.
2. Do not enumerate each item.
3. For each item, list the title followed by its link on the immediate line below.
4. Separate each news block with a single blank line.
4. Provide only the list. Do not include introductions, conclusions, or additional commentary.
Here is the list of news:
{{ $json.lista_noticias.map(item => item.title + "-" + item.link).join('\n') }}

=Act as an expert news editor. Analyze the following list of international news and select only the 10 most important ones based on global impact, political relevance, or significant human interest.
Formatting instructions:
1. Select exactly 10 news items.
2. Do not enumerate each item.
3. For each item, list the title followed by its link on the immediate line below.
4. Separate each news block with a single blank line.
5. Provide only the list. Do not include introductions, conclusions, or additional commentary.
Here is the list of news:
{{ $json.lista_noticias.map(item => item.title + "-" + item.link).join('\n') }}

=Act as an expert news editor. Analyze the following list of international news and select only the 10 most important ones based on global impact, political relevance, or significant human interest. Output requirements: ​1. Header Spacing: Start your response exactly with: "These are the top 10 most important news:". Follow this phrase with two HTML line break tags (

). ​2. Professional Numbered List: Use an HTML ordered list (
    ) to format the stories. Wrap each individual news item inside
  1. tags. ​3. Internal Item Layout: Inside each
  2. , format the content as follows: [Title of the news] > [Read more] ​4. Spacing: Add a margin-bottom: 15px; to each
  3. tag to ensure there is enough white space between the different news stories. ​5. Clean Links: Use "[Read more]" as the anchor text. Do not display raw URLs or the word "Link:". 6. Final Spacing: After closing the ordered list (
), add two HTML line break tags (

) to create whitespace at the end of the response. Here is the list of news: {{ $json.lista_noticias_todas.map(item => item.noticias_merged).join('\n\n---\n\n') }}

=Act as a specialized science and tehcnology editor. Analyze the following list of news and select only the 10 most important ones based on scientific breakthrough, technical innovation, practical impact on society or industry and reliability and non sensationalist value.
Formatting instructions:
1. Select exactly 10 news items.
2. Do not enumerate each item.
3. For each item, list the title followed by its link on the immediate line below.
4. Separate each news block with a single blank line.
5. Provide only the list. Do not include introductions, conclusions, or additional commentary.
Here is the list of news:
{{ $json.lista_noticias.map(item => item.title + "-" + item.link).join('\n') }}
